overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates a neon-lit intersection with holographic advertisements and continues along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with elevated highway

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
begins crossing the street after waiting for traffic

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing traffic before crossing

large curved architectural span with integrated neon lighting crossing above the street
skyscraper facade covered with holographic advertisements and vertical cyan neon strips
futuristic horizontal light bar on curved pole

segments.scene_description: Standing at a futuristic city intersection at night, waiting as a futuristic sedan passes by. The scene is dominated by an elevated highway ramp on the left with cyan neon lighting and a massive curved arch structure spanning the street. A tall glass tower with holographic advertisements rises on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: crosswalk with glowing WALK signal projection

events.description: turns right onto the sidewalk after crossing the intersection
green WALK signal appears projected on the crosswalk ground

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the crosswalk

entered.detail: building facade with continuous horizontal cyan neon light strips at ground level
tall palm trees with lit trunks lining the street

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet intersection with a glowing green WALK signal projected on the asphalt, then turning right onto the sidewalk. The camera passes by a modern building with striking cyan neon trim at its base while palm trees line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk with reflective wet pavement

events.description: food vendor cart comes into view on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet reflective sidewalk next to the cyan-lit building

entered.detail: large red digital advertisement screen displaying graphics on building facade
street food cart with umbrella and cooking equipment on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the rain-slicked sidewalk with the cyan neon-trimmed building on the right and palm trees on the left. The pavement reflects the neon lights vividly. A food vendor cart appears ahead on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with transit entrance and storefronts

events.description: passing the food vendor cart while continuing straight

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor and continuing down the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beside the cart under an umbrella

entered.detail: building entrance with vertical green-lit windows resembling a transit station

segments.scene_description: Walking past the food vendor cart and continuing along the sidewalk. The building with cyan neon trim continues on the right, while a transit entrance with distinctive green lighting becomes visible ahead. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into a narrow, rain-slicked pedestrian corridor. It begins stationary beneath a massive curved arch and an elevated highway ramp, waiting for a futuristic sedan to pass while a glass tower with holographic advertisements looms to the right. As the camera crosses the wet asphalt guided by a glowing green walk signal, the view shifts right onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and a building featuring striking cyan neon trim. The scene then proceeds along the reflective pavement, passing a food vendor cart as the vivid neon lights shimmer in the rainwater. Finally, the path continues past the cyan-trimmed architecture toward a transit entrance marked by distinctive green lighting.
